summary: Checkup passed clean after 2026-03-27 session. Features: markPlayedOnStart (replaces Sequence Run Detection), Fruit font enforcement (Inter everywhere, Rock Salt for Shakedown branding), mini player polish (title size, time alignment, progress bar), show list card text size/gap. Three test regressions fixed during checkup: fruitDenseList missing from _FakeSettings, ThemeProvider nullable reads in ShakedownTitle+EmbeddedMiniPlayer, embedded_mini_player_test SizedBox width constraint. Baseline: 0ac43a8.
